actions.label: Actions
actions.desc: Create, run, dismiss, retry — primary verbs

agent.label: Agent · Model
agent.desc: Signals about the model — thinking, tokens, context, cost

layout.label: Layout
layout.desc: Workspace surfaces — sidebar, split, focus, minimap

status.label: Status
status.desc: State carriers — quiet on rest, loud on action

icons.name: plus
icons.purpose: Create new — new tab, new session, new task in plan.

icons.name: minus
icons.purpose: Remove / collapse. Pair with plus on a stepper.

icons.name: close
icons.purpose: Dismiss. Close a tab, modal, command bridge, or tweaks panel.

icons.name: check
icons.purpose: Done / completed. Tool call success, plan task finished, approval.

icons.name: play
icons.purpose: Run / approve & ship. Kicks off plan execution or replays a tool call.

icons.name: pause
icons.purpose: Pause the agent. Holds the loop without killing context.
paths: <rect x="4" y="3" width="3" height="10"/><rect x="9" y="3" width="3" height="10"/>

icons.name: stop
icons.purpose: Hard stop. Cancel current run; agent gives back the floor.

icons.name: refresh
icons.purpose: Retry. Re-run the same tool call or replay last message.

icons.name: copy
icons.purpose: Copy to clipboard. Used on code blocks, tool args, file paths.
paths: <rect x="5" y="5" width="8" height="8" rx="1"/><path d="M3 10V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h6"/>

icons.name: trash
icons.purpose: Delete. Drop a session, message, or plan task. Confirm before destructive.

icons.name: file
icons.purpose: Read file tool call. Pair with cyan tone.

icons.name: folder
icons.purpose: Directory listing. Project root selector, ls-style tools.

icons.name: edit
icons.purpose: Write tool call. New content / overwrite.

icons.name: diff
icons.purpose: Edit / patch tool call. Inline diffs and split views.

icons.name: bash
icons.purpose: Shell / terminal tool call. Pair with amber tone.

icons.name: search
icons.purpose: Generic search. Command bridge, palette.

icons.name: grep
icons.purpose: Code search / grep tool. Distinct from search by the inner equals bar.

icons.name: test
icons.purpose: Run tests. Test-runner tool call status.

icons.name: build
icons.purpose: Build / compile tool call. Pair with bar-chart growth.
paths: <rect x="2" y="6" width="5" height="8"/><rect x="9" y="2" width="5" height="12"/>

icons.name: web
icons.purpose: Web fetch / browser tool. External calls leaving the sandbox.

icons.name: plan
icons.purpose: Plan-mode toggle, todo chip, kanban surface entry. The signature feature icon.
paths: <rect x="2" y="3" width="3" height="10"/><rect x="6.5" y="3" width="3" height="6"/><rect x="11" y="3" width="3" height="8"/>

icons.name: thinking
icons.purpose: Reasoning / chain-of-thought blocks. Strategy explainers.

icons.name: agent
icons.purpose: Represents the agent itself. Avatar, peer-session card, multi-agent indicators.
paths: <rect x="3" y="5" width="10" height="8" rx="2"/><path d="M8 2v3"/><circle cx="6" cy="9" r=".7" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="10" cy="9" r=".7" fill="currentColor"/>

icons.name: sparkle
icons.purpose: AI-generated content marker. Inline beside model output, suggestion chips.

icons.name: bolt
icons.purpose: Fast / latency-aware path. Use for low-thinking-effort or cached responses.

icons.name: radar
icons.purpose: Activity radar widget; ambient telemetry of recent tool calls.
paths: <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="3"/><path d="M8 8l4-3"/>

icons.name: voice
icons.purpose: Voice / dictation mode in the composer.

icons.name: context
icons.purpose: Context window usage gauge. Filled wedge = consumed tokens.
paths: <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/><path d="M8 8 L8 2 A6 6 0 0 1 13 11 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".15" stroke-width="0"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/>

icons.name: tokens
icons.purpose: Tokens / cost units. Status bar metrics, budget displays.
paths: <circle cx="5" cy="8" r="3"/><circle cx="11" cy="8" r="3"/>

icons.name: cost
icons.purpose: Dollar-cost. Plan budget panel, settings billing.

icons.name: arrow
icons.purpose: Forward / submit. Composer send, next-step CTAs.

icons.name: arrowUp
icons.purpose: Send message in composer. The default submit affordance.

icons.name: chev
icons.purpose: Disclose / expand. Selects, accordions, dropdowns.

icons.name: chevR
icons.purpose: Drill in. Tree expanders, breadcrumb separators.

icons.name: home
icons.purpose: Project home / session list root.

icons.name: back
icons.purpose: History back. Walk through prior states or messages.

icons.name: external
icons.purpose: Opens in a new window or browser. Web-fetch results, doc links.

icons.name: sidebar
icons.purpose: Toggle the side rail (sessions list, ambient widgets).
paths: <rect x="2" y="3" width="12" height="10" rx="1"/><path d="M6 3v10"/>

icons.name: split
icons.purpose: Split view. Spawns a peer agent in a second pane.
paths: <rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="1"/><path d="M8 2v12"/>

icons.name: grid
icons.purpose: Multi-session overview. Tab-grouping surfaces.
paths: <rect x="2" y="2" width="5" height="5"/><rect x="9" y="2" width="5" height="5"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="5" height="5"/><rect x="9" y="9" width="5" height="5"/>

icons.name: minimap
icons.purpose: Session minimap toggle. Scrubbable timeline of the conversation.
paths: <rect x="2" y="2" width="12" height="12" rx="1"/><rect x="4" y="6" width="8" height="3"/>

icons.name: layers
icons.purpose: Stack of revisions / undo history.

icons.name: focus
icons.purpose: Focus / fullscreen mode. Hide chrome, max the canvas.

icons.name: circle
icons.purpose: Generic status pip. Default neutral state.

icons.name: dot
icons.purpose: Compact unread / dirty marker. Tab title indicator.

icons.name: warn
icons.purpose: Risk / caution. Plan-risk chips, destructive previews.

icons.name: info
icons.purpose: Hint / help. Tooltips, model-help drawer trigger.

icons.name: clock
icons.purpose: Wall-time estimate. Plan-budget row, queued tool calls.

icons.name: live
icons.purpose: Live / streaming. Pulses while a tool is running. Recording-style.
paths: <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5.5"/>

icons.name: branch
icons.purpose: Active git branch. Plan header, branch-from-here action.

icons.name: merge
icons.purpose: Merge a side-conversation back into the main session.

icons.name: commit
icons.purpose: Commit point on the timeline. Snapshot of agent state.

icons.name: diff2
icons.purpose: Compare revisions / before-after. Diff scrubber.

icons.name: command
icons.purpose: ⌘K command bridge entry point. Power-user palette.

icons.name: image
icons.purpose: Image attachment in composer; image-content message bubbles.

icons.name: link
icons.purpose: Hyperlinks / shareable session URL.

icons.name: send
icons.purpose: Send (alternate to arrowUp). Use when send is a primary surface action.

icons.name: cog
icons.purpose: Settings. Theme, accent, layout, model defaults.
